a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Requirements/SafetyParentReq.md
a.text: UAV shall not cause injury to persons or property during any flight phase

a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Requirements/SafeLandingReq.md
a.text: Autonomous safe landing on battery-critical or link-loss event

a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Requirements/FaultTolerantFCReq.md
a.text: Flight controller shall detect single sensor failure within 50 ms

a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Verification/SafetyCaseReview.md
a.text: Safety case review confirms UAV shall not cause injury across all flight phases

a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Verification/SafeLandingTest.md
a.text: Autonomous landing descent rate ≤ 3 m/s on battery-critical trigger

a.title: https://github.com/sjames/syscribe/blob/main/model/Verification/FCFaultInjectionTest.md
a.text: FC detects injected sensor failure within 50 ms on HIL bench
